command:
$script = @'
import json, urllib.request, struct, base64, os, socket, time

def cdp_get_pages():
    r = urllib.request.urlopen("http://localhost:9222/json", timeout=5)
    return json.loads(r.read())

def ws_cmd(ws_url, msg, wait=3):
    from urllib.parse import urlparse
    u = urlparse(ws_url)
    host = u.hostname
    port = u.port or 80
    s = socket.create_connection((host, port), timeout=15)
    key = base64.b64encode(os.urandom(16)).decode()
    req = f"GET {u.path} HTTP/1.1\r\nHost: {host}:{port}\r\nUpgrade: websocket\r\nConnection: Upgrade\r\nSec-WebSocket-Key: {key}\r\nSec-WebSocket-Version: 13\r\n\r\n"
    s.sendall(req.encode())
    resp = b""
    while b"\r\n\r\n" not in resp:
        resp += s.recv(4096)
    data = msg.encode("utf-8")
    frame = bytearray([0x81])
    l = len(data)
    mask_key = os.urandom(4)
    if l < 126:
        frame.append(0x80 | l)
    elif l < 65536:
        frame.append(0x80 | 126)
        frame.extend(struct.pack(">H", l))
    frame.extend(mask_key)
    masked = bytearray(b ^ mask_key[i%4] for i,b in enumerate(data))
    frame.extend(masked)
    s.sendall(frame)
    time.sleep(wait)
    s.settimeout(5)
    all_data = b""
    try:
        while True:
            chunk = s.recv(65536)
            if not chunk: break
            all_data += chunk
            if len(chunk) < 65536: break
    except: pass
    s.close()
    result = ""
    pos = 0
    while pos < len(all_data):
        if pos+2 > len(all_data): break
        b1 = all_data[pos+1] & 0x7F
        hlen = 2
        if b1 == 126: hlen = 4
        elif b1 == 127: hlen = 10
        if pos+hlen > len(all_data): break
        if b1 == 126:
            plen = struct.unpack(">H", all_data[pos+2:pos+4])[0]
        elif b1 == 127:
            plen = struct.unpack(">Q", all_data[pos+2:pos+10])[0]
        else:
            plen = b1
        payload = all_data[pos+hlen:pos+hlen+plen]
        result += payload.decode("utf-8", errors="replace")
        pos = pos+hlen+plen
    return result

# Check the sign-in challenge page first
pages = cdp_get_pages()
print("=== All pages ===")
for i,p in enumerate(pages):
    u = p["url"]
    if len(u)>100: u=u[:100]+"..."
    print(f"[{i}] {u}")

# Find sign-in page
signin = None
for p in pages:
    if "accounts.google.com" in p["url"] and "signin" in p["url"]:
        signin = p
        break

if signin:
    ws = signin["webSocketDebuggerUrl"]
    print(f"\n=== Sign-in page ===")
    js = 'JSON.stringify({t:document.title,u:location.href.substring(0,120),inp:Array.from(document.querySelectorAll("input")).map(i=>({n:i.name,a:i.getAttribute("aria-label"),tp:i.type,v:i.offsetParent!==null})).filter(x=>x.v),h1:Array.from(document.querySelectorAll("h1,h2,h3,span[jsname]")).map(e=>e.textContent.trim()).filter(t=>t&&t.length>2&&t.length<100).slice(0,10)})'
    r = ws_cmd(ws, json.dumps({"id":1,"method":"Runtime.evaluate","params":{"expression":js}}), wait=2)
    print(f"Sign-in info: {r[:800]}")
else:
    print("No sign-in page found")

# Also check if we can create a new target for add-a-place
browser_ws = None
try:
    r2 = urllib.request.urlopen("http://localhost:9222/json/version", timeout=5)
    ver = json.loads(r2.read())
    browser_ws = ver.get("webSocketDebuggerUrl","")
    print(f"\nBrowser WS: {browser_ws[:80]}")
except: print("Could not get browser WS")
'@
$script | Out-File -FilePath 'C:\temp\cdp_signin.py' -Encoding UTF8 -Force
python C:\temp\cdp_signin.py
description: CDP - فحص صفحة تسجيل الدخول + محاولة فتح تبويب جديد
